connectors.name: Findem People
connectors.description: Search talent, resolve people, analyze candidate pools, create scorecards, and review candidate details using Findem's recruiting and people-search tools.

connectors.name: Findem Companies
connectors.description: Research companies, resolve company identities, inspect taxonomy, and retrieve company intelligence from Findem.

connectors.name: Findem Tempo
connectors.description: Answer historical workforce questions such as who worked at a company in a given year, who joined in a given year, or who left in a given year.
